_comment: KNOWN-BAD calibration fixture (P6 connection-integrity, empirical-healthcare D4 class). This COM record is schema-clean in every OTHER respect but its sub_sector[] can never bind a firm: 'phantom-subsector' is not a facts/vocabulary.js CANONICAL_SUB_SECTORS node at all, and 'solo-practice' IS canonical yet UNREACHABLE (no classifier leaf resolves to it, it is neither a sector label nor a synonym of a leaf). Before P6, gate-4 was exact-string membership and a record like this shipped valid yet dead - the exact Botox/injectables miss. catalogue/linters/sub-sector-binding.js MUST flag this record (both the unknown-sub-sector and the dead-record rules) or it has not earned its zero (Constitution Rule 4).
name: Calibration: a record whose sub_sector can bind no classifiable firm
applies_when: a synthetic calibration record; not a real law
